name: SSL Certificate Check
description: Prüft Gültigkeit und Laufzeit eines TLS-Zertifikats.

commands.bash: openssl s_client -connect google.com:443 -servername google.com < /dev/null 2>/dev/null | openssl x509 -noout -dates
commands.cmd: powershell "$cert = [Net.ServicePointManager]::ServerCertificateValidationCallback = {$true}; try { $web = New-Object System.Net.WebClient; $web.DownloadString('https://www.google.com'); Write-Host 'SSL Certificate valid' } catch { Write-Host 'SSL Certificate issue: ' $_.Exception.Message }"
commands.powershell: $cert = [Net.ServicePointManager]::ServerCertificateValidationCallback = {$true}; try { $web = New-Object System.Net.WebClient; $web.DownloadString('https://www.google.com'); Write-Host 'SSL Certificate valid' } catch { Write-Host 'SSL Certificate issue: ' $_.Exception.Message }
commands.wsl: openssl s_client -connect google.com:443 -servername google.com < /dev/null 2>/dev/null | openssl x509 -noout -dates
commands.zsh: openssl s_client -connect google.com:443 -servername google.com < /dev/null 2>/dev/null | openssl x509 -noout -dates
